explanation: The requirement specifies that once the controller enters fail-safe mode, it cannot transition to any other operating mode unless a power cycle occurs. This is captured by stating that while the system is in failSafeMode, it must always satisfy that no other primary operating mode (PSVMode, PCVMode, StandbyMode, SelfTestMode, or StartUpMode) is active, and this condition holds until the system is completely off, which signifies the initiation of a power cycle.
decision3_substring: cannot return from fail-safe mode to any other mode without a power cycle (turn off and then turn on the machine)
output_structured_natural_language: while failSafeMode, until off, satisfy !(PSVMode | PCVMode | StandbyMode | SelfTestMode | StartUpMode)
